fields.topics: Topics you'd like to write about

form.success: Thank you! We received your request and will be in touch shortly.
form.error: An error occurred while submitting the request. Please try again.
form.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.url: Please enter a valid URL (starting with http:// or https://).

partner.title: Become a Hospeda partner
partner.subtitle: Join us as an agency or business ally and let's work together to connect travelers with the Litoral region.

benefits.item1: Access to a network of verified accommodations and businesses across the region.
benefits.item2: Joint visibility in our campaigns and outreach channels.
benefits.item3: Tailored commercial terms depending on the partnership type.
benefits.item4: A team that reviews every proposal individually.

sponsor.title: Sponsor Hospeda
sponsor.subtitle: Associate your brand with the leading tourism platform of the Litoral region and reach thousands of travelers.

benefits.item1: Brand presence on the website and in featured content.
benefits.item2: Access to audiences segmented by destination and interests.
benefits.item3: Flexible sponsorship packages tailored to your goals.
benefits.item4: Reach and impact reports for every campaign.

serviceProvider.title: Join as a service provider
serviceProvider.subtitle: If you offer a service for accommodations or hosts (maintenance, cleaning, supplies, and more), apply to our provider directory.

benefits.item1: Visibility with dozens of active hosts on the platform.
benefits.item2: A direct contact channel with people who need your service.
benefits.item3: Curated by the Hospeda team: only reviewed providers make it into the directory.
benefits.item4: No listing cost — our team adds you manually after reviewing your request.

editor.title: Join as an editor
editor.subtitle: Our blog and event calendar grow through people who know and love the Litoral region. If you enjoy writing or curating content, apply.

role.item1: Write or review blog articles about the destinations of the Litoral region.
role.item2: Load and curate calendar events: dates, venues, descriptions.
role.item3: Propose topics and help keep content up to date.

crossIncentive.title: Are you an accommodation owner or Hospeda partner?
crossIncentive.body: Collaborating as an editor can also unlock benefits on your subscription. Apply and tell us your case — we'll review it and reach out with the details.
